# VyaparAI

> AI business automation platform for Indian MSMEs. Your AI employee that manages invoices, inventory, customers and business insights.

## Overview
VyaparAI is an AI-powered autonomous business operations assistant. It is not a chatbot — it is a workflow engine: Documents → AI Processing → Business Data → Automation → Predictions → Actions.

## Features
- AI Invoice Processing: https://vyaparai.vercel.app/features/ai-invoice-processing
- Inventory AI: https://vyaparai.vercel.app/features/inventory-ai
- Customer AI: https://vyaparai.vercel.app/features/customer-ai
- Business Insights: https://vyaparai.vercel.app/features/business-insights

## Solutions
- Kirana Store: https://vyaparai.vercel.app/solutions/kirana-store
- Pharmacy: https://vyaparai.vercel.app/solutions/pharmacy
- Retail Business: https://vyaparai.vercel.app/solutions/retail-business

## Resources
- Blog: https://vyaparai.vercel.app/blog
- About: https://vyaparai.vercel.app/about
